title: linum flavum subsp. basarabicum
intro: Linum flavum subsp. basarabicum, also known as Basarabic flax, is a subspecies of Linum flavum, a flowering plant in the family Linaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Linum flavum subsp. basarabicum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
